metadata.name: bs-monitoring
metadata.summary: A simple monitoring tool-kit enabling easier description of monitoring data pipelines.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.opsgenie.OpsgenieAlertService.__init__
documentation:
Alert service that sends alerts to Opsgenie.

Args:
    args (OpsgenieAlertServiceConfig): The configuration for the alert service.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.opsgenie.OpsgenieAlertService.build_alert
documentation:
Builds an alert object.

Args:
    message (str): The message for the alert.
    description (Optional[str], optional): Description for the alert. Defaults to None.
    alias (Optional[str], optional): Alias for the alert. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Dict[str, Any]: The alert object.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.opsgenie.OpsgenieAlertService.send_alert
documentation:
Sends an alert to the alert service.

Args:
    message (str): Alert message
    description (Optional[str], optional): Alert description. Defaults to None.
    alias (Optional[str], optional): Alert alias. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    Exception: Raised if the alert could not be sent.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.discord.DiscordAlertService.__init__
documentation:
Alert service that sends alerts to Discord via webhooks.

To get the webhook URL:
1. Go to Discord Server Settings
2. Select "Integrations"
3. Click on "Webhooks"
4. Create a new webhook or use existing one
5. Copy the Webhook URL

Args:
    config: The configuration containing the webhook_url.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.discord.DiscordAlertService.build_alert
documentation:
Builds a Discord webhook message.

Args:
    message (str): The message title for the alert.
    description (Optional[str]): Description for the alert. Defaults to None.
    alias (Optional[str]): Not used for Discord. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Dict[str, Any]: The Discord webhook message object.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.discord.DiscordAlertService.send_alert
documentation:
Sends an alert to Discord via webhook.

Args:
    message (str): Alert message
    description (Optional[str]): Alert description. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    Exception: Raised if the alert could not be sent.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.common.utils.MonitoringServiceError
documentation: Base class for exceptions in the monitoring service.

functions.name: bs_monitoring.common.configs.base.read_yaml_config
documentation:
Reads a YAML configuration file and returns a RootConfig object.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the YAML configuration file.

Raises:
    ArgumentTypeError: Raised if the file cannot be read or the configuration is invalid.

Returns:
    RootConfig: The configuration object.

functions.name: bs_monitoring.common.configs.base.read_config
documentation:
Parses the command line arguments and reads the configuration file.

Returns:
    RootConfig: The configuration object.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.common.configs.base.RootConfig
documentation:
Configuration for the service, contains configurations for the different components.
Is read from a YAML file.

Args:
    DataSource (DataSourceConfig): The configuration for the data source component.
    AlertService (AlertServiceConfig): The configuration for the alert service component.
    Monitors (List[MonitorConfig]): The configuration for the monitor components.
from bs_monitoring.common.utils import import_submodules

functions.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.base.alert
documentation:
Decorator to send an alert if an exception is raised.

Args:
    message (str): The message to send in the alert.

Returns:
    Callable: The decorated function.

functions.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.base.create_alert_service
documentation:
Create an alert service based on the configuration.

Args:
    config (AlertServiceConfig): The configuration for the alert service.

Raises:
    Exception: If the alert service type is unknown.

Returns:
    AlertService: The alert service subclass instance.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.base.AlertServiceConfig
documentation:
Configuration for the alert service component

Args:
    type (str): The type of the alert service.
    config (Union[OpsgenieAlertServiceConfig, None], optional): The configuration for the alert service. Defaults to None.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.base.AlertService

methods.name: bs_monitoring.alert_services.base.AlertService.send_alert
documentation:
Method to send an alert.

Args:
    message (str): The message for the alert.
    description (Optional[str], optional): Extra description for the alert. Defaults to None.
Abstract class for alert services.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.pipeline.Pipeline.shutdown
documentation: Cleanup tasks tied to the service's shutdown.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.pipeline.Pipeline._run
documentation: Run the pipeline continuously using asyncio.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.pipeline.Pipeline.run
documentation: Entry point to run the pipeline in the event loop.

functions.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.base.create_data_source
documentation:
Create a data source based on the configuration.

Args:
    config (DataSourceConfig): The configuration for the data source.
    alert_service (AlertService): The alert service to use.

Raises:
    Exception: If the data source type is unknown.

Returns:
    DataSource: The data source subclass instance.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.base.DataSourceConfig
documentation:
Configuration for the data source component

Args:
    type (str): The type of the data source.
    config (Union[ElasticDataSourceConfig, None], optional): The configuration for the data source. Defaults to None.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.base.DataSource.produce
documentation: Single production of data from the data source.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.base.DataSource.produce_continuous
documentation:
Continuously produce data at specified intervals using asyncio.

Args:
    interval_seconds (float): Interval between productions in seconds. Defaults to 86400 (1 day).

methods.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.base.DataSource.close
documentation: Clean up any resources.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.data_scheme.DataSchemeError.__init__
documentation:
Exception raised when there is an error in the data scheme.

Args:
    message (str): The error message.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.data_scheme.DataSchemeMonitor.__init__
documentation:
Monitor to check the data scheme of the data.

Args:
    alert_service (AlertService): The alert service to use.
    config (DataSchemeMonitorConfig): The configuration for the monitor.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.data_scheme.DataSchemeMonitor.process
documentation:
Method to process the data, sends an alert if the data does not match the data scheme.

Args:
    data (Dict[str, Any]): The data to process.

Raises:
    DataSchemeError: Raised if the data does not match the data scheme.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.elastic.ElasticDataSourceConfig
documentation:
Configuration for the Elasticsearch data source.

Args:
    url (str): The URL for the Elasticsearch instance.
    indices (List[str]): The indices to consume messages from.
    basic_auth (Optional[List[str]], optional): Basic authentication credentials. Defaults to None.
    api_key (Optional[str], optional): API key for the Elasticsearch instance. Defaults to None.
    history_length (int, optional): The history length to consume messages from. Defaults to 1

methods.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.elastic.ElasticDataSource.__init__
documentation:
A data source that consumes messages from Elasticsearch.

Args:
    args (ElasticDataSourceConfig): The configuration for the data source.
    alert_service (AlertService): The alert service to use.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.elastic.ElasticDataSource.produce
documentation: Consumes messages from Elasticsearch since last check.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.data_sources.elastic.ElasticDataSource.close
documentation: Clean up Elasticsearch client connection.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.data_quantity.DataQuantityError.__init__
documentation:
Exception raised when data quantity is 0.

Args:
    message (str): The error message.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.data_quantity.DataQuantityMonitor.__init__
documentation:
Monitor to check the quantity of data.

Args:
    alert_service (AlertService): The alert service to use.
    config (None, optional): No purpose, required because of the factory method. Defaults to None.

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.data_quantity.DataQuantityMonitor.process
documentation:
Method to process the data, sends an alert if the data date is a weekday and the data quantity is 0.

Args:
    data (Dict[str, Any]): The data to process.

Raises:
    DataQuantityError: Raised if the data quantity is 0 and is weekday.

functions.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.base.register_monitor
documentation:
Decorator to register a monitor.

Args:
    cls (Monitor): Subclass of Monitor to register.

Returns:
    Monitor: The registered Monitor subclass.

functions.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.base.create_monitors
documentation:
Method to create a monitor instances based on the configuration.

Args:
    configs (List[MonitorConfig]): The configuration for the different monitors.
    alert_service (AlertService): The alert service to use.

Returns: List[Monitor]: The list of monitor instances.

classes.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.base.MonitorConfig
documentation:
Configuration for the monitor component

Args:
    type (str): The type of the monitor.

Abstract class for monitors.

Args:

methods.name: bs_monitoring.monitors.base.Monitor.process

Process the data from the data source.
